extraction.one_line_summary: EWAN Caleb won Stage 7 sprint after GOŁAŚ Michał break-checked the Quick-Step train protecting GAVIRIA Fernando, disrupting their leadout timing
tactical_patterns: GOŁAŚ positioned solo in front of GAVIRIA to deliberately slow Quick-Step train, allowing rivals to close gaps.
KOREN Kristijan launched planned solo attack 18.7km out, forcing KIRYIENKA to chase and drain Sky's sprint support.
Quick-Step lost GAVIRIA by deploying leadout too early; final man peeled off with 300m remaining.

rider_signals.EWAN Caleb: positive: won without dedicated leadout after HOFLAND pulled off prematurely, showing he can finish from chaos
rider_signals.GAVIRIA Fernando: negative: Quick-Step train disrupted by rival blocking tactics; finished second despite numerical advantage
rider_signals.BENNETT Sam: positive: third place without visible leadout support indicates raw sprint speed competitive with top tier
rider_signals.GREIPEL André: neutral: present in final but lacked positioning to contest for podium
rider_signals.GOŁAŚ Michał: positive: deliberately brake-checked peloton solo to disrupt Quick-Step timing, tactical sacrifice that worked
rider_signals.KOREN Kristijan: neutral: late solo attack at 18.7km forced chase work but always calculated to fail
